prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **F6A 660cc turbocharged inline-3** (from the Suzuki Alto Works RS/R) with a **Garrett GT12 turbocharger** (40mm compressor wheel, 52mm turbine) and **HKS Super SQV IV blow-off valve** to handle boost spikes up to 1.2 bar. Port-and-polish the cylinder head with **Toda Racing valves** (1mm oversized intake, 0.8mm oversized exhaust) and **Ferrea valve springs** for 9,000 RPM stability. Custom **ECU reflash via Haltech Elite 1500** with individual cylinder fuel trims and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** for AFR targeting 12.5:1 under boost.

Full **custom 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold** (304-grade, 1.5mm wall thickness) by **JUN Auto** paired with a **Sparco 2.5-inch cat-back exhaust** (straight-pipe, no resonator) and **Bosch 1000cc high-impedance injectors** for E85 compatibility. **Nismo oil cooler kit** (front-mount, 10-row) with **Mocal thermostatic sandwich plate** to maintain oil temps below 100°C under track use.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (custom valving for JA71 chassis, 200mm travel) and **SuperPro poly bushings** (front control arms, subframe, and trailing arms). **Cusco 22mm rear sway bar** (adjustable, 3-position) and **Whiteline front strut brace** to reduce body roll. **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers** (from Fiat 500 Abarth) with **DBA 4000 Series rotors** (280mm front, 240mm rear) and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for fade resistance.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Pandem JA71 widebody kit** (fiberglass, bolt-on fenders with 50mm extended wheel arches) paired with **Work Equip 03 wheels** (15x8 +15 offset, 5x139.7 PCD) wrapped in **Yokohama Geolandar MT G003 tires** (215/75R15). **Custom aluminum roof rack** by **Front Runner Outfitters** with **PIAA 520 LED light bar** (30-inch, 18,000 lumens) for overlanding functionality.

**Carbon fiber hood** (functional vents, 3K twill weave) from **Seibon** with **Aerocatch hood latches** and **custom LED daytime running lights** (Cree XHP50.2, 5000K) integrated into the front bumper. **Rear quarter-window delete** (replaced with **aluminum panels** from **Boom Mat**) and **custom rear diffuser** (3D-printed PETG, bolt-on) with **DTM-style tow hooks** (front and rear, powder-coated red).

**Full interior cage** by **Custom Cages UK** (8-point, TIG-welded, 4130 chromoly) with **Sparco Pro ADV seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and **Schroth 6-point harnesses**. **Momo Mod.78 steering wheel** (350mm, suede) on a **NRG quick-release hub** with **Defi BF gauges** (oil temp, oil pressure, boost) mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod**. **Sound deadening** via **Kilmat 80mil butyl sheets** and **custom aluminum floor panels** (riveted, 2mm thick) for weight reduction.
